news.headline: Assaf Henkin, Jedify CEO: A Fortt Knox Conversation

The Israeli serial founder, whose Kontera was acquired by Singtel and folded into Amobee, calls it Semantic Fusion: a layer that fuses live enterprise data so agents stop guessing.

news.summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is packed with companies that have built dominant market positions, making it a core index for investors. A select few continue to innovate and expand, setting themselves up for long-term success.
